overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark forest at night. The character travels from a village outskirts across a wooden rope bridge and continues along a winding dirt path through dense woodland with atmospheric blue-green lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts path with wooden fences

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the village path toward a wooden bridge

entered.detail: weathered wooden picket fence lining the right side of the path
low stone wall running along the left side of the path
wooden village structure with thatched roof visible through the trees
wooden gate structure marking the entrance to the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone path in a village outskirts area at night. Wooden fences and stone walls line the path as the character approaches a wooden gate leading to a bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden rope bridge over water with luminescent plants

events.description: steps onto wooden rope bridge crossing over water

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the wooden plank bridge with swords visible on back

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge with thick rope railings spanning the water
thick rope handrails on the sides of the bridge
dark water visible beneath the bridge planks
glowing blue-white flowers or plants growing in the water along the banks

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden rope bridge over a dark water channel. Luminescent plants glow along the water banks as the character walks across the plank bridge toward the forest beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with stone walls

events.description: exits bridge and enters dense forest path on dirt ground

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path through the dark forest with dense trees on both sides

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with visible footprints
tall dense trees with thick trunks lining both sides of the path
low stone wall running parallel to the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, the character enters a dense forest trail. The ground changes to dirt as tall trees close in on both sides, with a stone wall running along the right side of the winding path.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path as wooden fences appear alongside the trail

entered.detail: simple wooden post fence appearing on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues deeper into the forest along the dirt trail. Wooden fences now line the left side of the path while the stone wall recedes into the middle distance, and the forest canopy grows thicker overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the structured outskirts of a village into the depths of a dense, atmospheric forest at night. It begins on a cobblestone path lined with wooden fences and stone walls, moving steadily toward a wooden gate. As the character passes through the gate, the scene shifts to a wooden rope bridge spanning a dark water channel, where luminescent plants cast a soft glow along the banks. The camera then follows the character off the planks and onto a winding dirt trail, as the open air of the bridge gives way to towering trees that close in from both sides. Finally, the path narrows further, guided by a stone wall running along the right side of the woodland track.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character ventures deeper into a dense, atmospheric woodland. It begins along a dirt trail where a stone wall gradually recedes into the middle distance. As the camera advances, the open perimeter shifts into a more enclosed environment with wooden fences appearing to line the left side of the path. The scene then tightens as the forest canopy grows thicker overhead, casting the trail in deeper shadow.
